CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARK'S COLLISION SHOP, INC., DBA SHELBY AUTO BODY & PAINT DICHIERA, MARK TIBBITT, PAT POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE TEAM BLOWTHERM CONCEPT II CURE DOWNDRAFT SPRAY , FAIR MARKET VALUE $6,000.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $11,843.27 DAMAGES, $1,525.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $508.50 COSTS, $330.48 INTEREST ., TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,207.25, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH . SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-20-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
